name: costy
description: Production-ready Costy social media app (Next.js + Express + Prisma + pgvector + Redis + BullMQ).

scripts.docker:dev:migrate: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker exec app pnpm --filter @costy/db exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:dev:seed: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker exec app pnpm --filter @costy/db run seed
scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker build --no-cache && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker up -d --build
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker exec api pnpm --filter @costy/db exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker exec api pnpm --filter @costy/db run seed
scripts.docker:infra:up: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker up -d postgres redis minio
scripts.docker:infra:stop: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml --env-file docker/.env.docker stop postgres redis minio
